_comment: Catalog of common components not yet in the Figma file. build.mjs renders any of these (whose name is NOT already in components.json) as a 'planned' placeholder page, so the docs show the roadmap. To promote one: cut its entry from here, paste it into components.json, set status + codeConnected, and fill in real tokens, specs, and preview/example code. Delete entries you don't intend to build.

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: Binary on/off control for a single option or a list of options.

do: Pair every checkbox with a clickable label
dont: Use a checkbox for mutually exclusive options, use radio instead

components.name: Radio
components.description: Selects exactly one option from a small, mutually exclusive set.

do: Always show at least two options in a group
dont: Use radios when more than one choice can apply

components.name: Switch
components.description: Toggles a single setting on or off, taking effect immediately.

do: Use for settings that apply instantly
dont: Use a switch inside a form that needs a submit step, use a checkbox

components.name: Select
components.description: Choose one value from a longer list via a dropdown.

do: Use for 5+ options where radios would be too long
dont: Use a select for 2-3 options, prefer radios or a segmented control

components.name: Textarea
components.description: Multi-line text field for longer free-form input.

do: Give it a sensible default height of 3-4 lines
dont: Use a textarea for single-line values, use an input

components.name: Tabs
components.description: Switches between related views within the same context.

do: Keep tab labels to one or two words
dont: Use tabs for a sequential flow, use a stepper

components.name: Breadcrumb
components.description: Shows the current page's position in the hierarchy.

do: Mark the current page as non-clickable
dont: Use breadcrumbs for flat, single-level sites

components.name: Pagination
components.description: Moves through pages of a large, ordered result set.

do: Disable Previous/Next at the ends of the range
dont: Use pagination for infinite feeds, use load-more or infinite scroll

components.name: Alert
components.description: Inline message that communicates status without interrupting flow.

do: Keep the message to one or two sentences
dont: Use an alert for transient confirmation, use a toast

components.name: Toast
components.description: Brief, auto-dismissing confirmation of a completed action.

dont: Put critical, must-read content in a toast

components.name: Tooltip
components.description: Small label that explains an element on hover or focus.

do: Keep tooltips to a short phrase
dont: Put essential information only in a tooltip, it is hard to reach

do: Pair with a label for waits longer than a moment
dont: Use a spinner when you can show a progress bar instead

components.name: Dialog
components.description: Modal surface that interrupts to focus on a single task.

do: Return focus to the trigger when the dialog closes
dont: Stack dialogs on top of each other

components.name: Avatar
components.description: Represents a user or entity with an image, initials, or icon.

do: Provide a text alternative for the image
dont: Rely on color alone to convey status
